task_completion.description: Verify the Book resource is created in the BIO101 course with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Moodle course page (BIO101) showing a Book resource named 'Biology Lab Manual: Cell Biology Techniques', or the book's main page showing this title.

task_completion.description: Verify the book description and formatting settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the book settings page showing the description 'Comprehensive lab manual...' and Chapter formatting set to 'Numbers', or verify the 'Numbers' formatting by observing numbered chapters (1, 1.1, 2, etc.) in the Table of Contents block.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the first chapter 'Introduction to Microscopy'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Introduction to Microscopy' in the Table of Contents (numbered as 1). Check for content mentioning 'proper use of compound light microscopes' in the text editor or chapter view.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of 'Light Microscope Operation' as a subchapter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Light Microscope Operation' in the Table of Contents, indented and numbered as a subchapter (1.1). Check for content mentioning 'lowest power objective lens'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the chapter 'Cell Staining Techniques'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Cell Staining Techniques' in the Table of Contents (numbered as 2). Check for content mentioning 'visualize specific cellular structures'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of 'Gram Staining Protocol' as a subchapter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Gram Staining Protocol' in the Table of Contents, indented and numbered as a subchapter (2.1). Check for content mentioning 'crystal violet, iodine'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the final chapter 'Cell Culture Basics'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Cell Culture Basics' in the Table of Contents (numbered as 3). Check for content mentioning 'Aseptic technique' in the text editor or chapter view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Moodle web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating to localhost/moodle and interacting with the Moodle GUI, not just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Moodle GUI to create the book and chapters.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen clicking 'Add an activity or resource', filling out forms, and saving, rather than executing SQL commands or scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the text content was entered into Moodle's HTML editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or pasting the chapter content into the Moodle Atto/TinyMCE text editor boxes during chapter creation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course: BIO101. Book Name: 'Biology Lab Manual: Cell Biology Techniques'. Formatting: Numbers. Visibility: Visible to students. The Table of Contents must show exactly 5 items with this numbering structure: 1. Introduction to Microscopy (content includes 'proper use of compound light microscopes'), 1.1 Light Microscope Operation (content includes 'lowest power objective lens'), 2. Cell Staining Techniques (content includes 'visualize specific cellular structures'), 2.1 Gram Staining Protocol (content includes 'crystal violet, iodine'), 3. Cell Culture Basics (content includes 'Aseptic technique').
